idp-deprovisioning.notes: F2 IdP deprovisioning rollout — flip to APPROVED post-deploy after legal review of cooldown semantics + cross-border data-handling implications of suspendAccount + revokeAllSessions

module.idp-deprovisioning-gws.notes: F2 Phase 77 — per-provider FLAGS gate for Google Workspace deprovisioning (suspend + OAuth-grant revoke + sign-out-all-sessions). Ship dark; flip to APPROVED post-deploy after legal review of cross-border data-handling. Engineers develop with FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local.

module.idp-deprovisioning-slack.notes: F2 Phase 77 — per-provider FLAGS gate for Slack deprovisioning (session-invalidate + SCIM-deactivate, Enterprise Grid). Ship dark; flip to APPROVED post-deploy after legal review. Independent of the GWS gate (D-15). Engineers develop with FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local.

module.idp-deprovisioning-entra.notes: F2 Phase 78 — per-provider FLAGS gate for Microsoft Entra ID deprovisioning (account disable + revokeSignInSessions + Conditional Access pre-flight + hybrid-AD hard-block). Independent enterprise rollout (D-12). Legal review deferred per Standing Constraint; dev via FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local.

module.idp-deprovisioning-okta.notes: F2 Phase 78 — per-provider FLAGS gate for Okta deprovisioning (deactivateUser + revokeUserSessions). Independent enterprise rollout (D-12). Legal review deferred per Standing Constraint; dev via FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local.

module.idp-deprovisioning-github.notes: F2 Phase 78 — per-provider FLAGS gate for GitHub deprovisioning (org-member removal + per-PAT SAML credential revoke + outside-collaborator manual flag). Independent enterprise rollout (D-12). Legal review deferred per Standing Constraint; dev via FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local.

offboarding-ip-foundation.notes: F4 Offboarding workflow foundation + KT templates + override permission. Werkvertrag wording deferred to Phase 75; this flag gates the workflow:override_blocking_task permission and PTO-aware fallback routing. Needs verification by legal entity before production deploy (override-dialog acknowledgement copy).

compliance-payment-block.notes: F1 Compliance hard payment-block at every payment-write entry point (payment.create + payment.lockAndExport). Blocks a contractor with severity=BLOCKING AND status=EXPIRED items. Legal-sensitive admin lockout posture per ROADMAP Phase 72. Engineers develop with FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local; production stays OFF (would-block soft-warn) until the legal entity verifies admin lockout copy. Standing Constraint: legal review DEFERRED post-deploy.

compliance-policy-engine.uk.right_to_wor.notes: UK Right-to-Work share code (90-day generation expiry); legal review deferred per Standing Constraint

compliance-policy-engine.uk.sds.notes: Status Determination Statement (Chapter 10 ITEPA 2003); required for IR35-INSIDE outcomes

compliance-policy-engine.de.a1.notes: A1-Bescheinigung (Deutsche Rentenversicherung); 24-month max per EU Reg 883/2004 Art 12

compliance-policy-engine.de.aufenthaltst.notes: Aufenthaltstitel residence permit (AufenthG §4); conditional on non-EU nationality

compliance-policy-engine.de.eight_b_estg.notes: §48b EStG Freistellungsbescheinigung; conditional on construction-sector engagement

compliance-policy-engine.pl.zus_a1.notes: ZUS A1 (zaświadczenie A1 z ZUS); 12-month max per PL implementation

compliance-policy-engine.pl.udt.notes: UDT certification; conditional on regulated-equipment engagement

compliance-policy-engine.ksa.iqama.notes: Iqama residency permit; 1-year max per Saudi MOI rule; boundary at 00:00 Asia/Riyadh

compliance-policy-engine.ksa.work_permit.notes: Work permit + Qiwa portal authorisation boolean (Phase 79 wires API)

compliance-policy-engine.uae.free_zone_l.notes: Free-zone trade license (DMCC, ADGM, etc.); annually renewed

compliance-portal-self-service.notes: F1 Compliance Phase 73 — contractor portal compliance self-service (upload-replacement + admin review). Ship dark; flip to APPROVED post-deploy after legal review of the self-service flow + notification copy. Engineers develop with FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local.

gulf.free-zone-tracking.notes: F3 Gulf Phase 79 — UAE free-zone assignment tracking + license-expiry payment-block + permitted-activity scope advisory (ME-only). Legal-sensitive: arms a payment hard-block on expired free-zone licenses + auto-NOC items. Ship dark; flip to APPROVED post-deploy after legal review of the free-zone authority legal names + payment-block lockout copy + NOC wording. Engineers develop with FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local.

gulf.saudization-dashboard.notes: F3 Gulf Phase 79 — Saudization dashboard (manual Nitaqat band + headcount, nationalisation rate, Qiwa-auth gap, Iqama roll-up, offboarding trajectory banner; ME-only). Legal-sensitive: surfaces Nitaqat band labels + Qiwa-auth status; system never auto-computes the band (locked anti-feature). Ship dark; flip to APPROVED post-deploy after legal review of the band/trajectory advisory copy. Engineers develop with FLAG_SIGNOFF_BYPASS=local.
